# Hotel Image Placeholders

Current placeholders are SVG so the site works immediately.

Use these JPG filenames for your real hotel photos:

- `home-hero.jpg`
- `home-balcony.jpg`
- `social-hero.jpg`
- `garden-day.jpg`
- `garden-night.jpg`
- `garden-booking-day.jpg`
- `garden-booking-night.jpg`
- `room-executive.jpg`
- `room-deluxe.jpg`
- `restaurant-main.jpg`
- `cafe-workspace.jpg`
- `cafe-games.jpg`
- `wellness-hero.jpg`

Put them in this folder:

- `apps/web/public/assets/images`

After uploading, update `src/config/siteContent.js` by changing `.svg` to `.jpg` for all image paths.
